package.name: rdump
package.summary: Capture a PHP process's own memory and analyse it with reli to find leaks, reference cycles and memory bottlenecks.
package.description:
Take a memory snapshot of the current PHP process at any point in time and analyse it offline with reli (reliforp/reli-prof): inspect the call stack at the moment of the dump; see which objects, strings and arrays exist, how much memory each uses and how they reference each other; and automatically surface memory leaks, resource leaks, circular references and memory bottlenecks.
A single rdump_dump() call writes the snapshot from inside the process, so the target needs no ptrace capability and no external tooling -- often easier to ship to production than attaching a profiler from the outside. Linux only; PHP 7.0-8.5, NTS and ZTS.
